situational_context: Running comeback continues: 3 runs completed since gap broken on 2026-05-03 (after 182 days off). Run #3 today: 3.53 km (exceeded 2.5 km protocol max by 41%, but HR well-controlled at avg 139 bpm in Z2). VO2max running improved 38.3 to 38.7. Primary modality remains e-bike commuting (~38 km/day on commute days). Chronic load declining (21.9, down from 22.3) as heavy April gravel sessions exit the 28-day window. ACWR at 0.73 — below optimal band [0.8-1.3], still in rebuild zone. HRV stable (weekly avg 40, BALANCED); RHR stable at 49.6 bpm. Weight stable at 104.1 kg (down 1.75 kg over 28 days). Sleep adequate at 7.31h 7d avg despite 2 short nights earlier in the week (baby disruption). No new labs since Dec 2025. Comeback protocol active — tissue tolerance remains the limiting factor at 104 kg. Next run (Run #4) planned Monday May 18 (Conges, 72h gap). Weekend: 2 cycling sessions (Sat 60 min Z2 + Sun 50 min Z1-Z2). Sur site days Tue 19 and Thu 21 — commute only.

plan_7d_ahead.type: Sur site — commute only (ebike ~16 / gravel ~50 load)
Sur site + Anniv Flore — commute only

recommendations.text: Run #4 on Monday May 18 (Conges): max 3.5 km Z1-Z2 on soft surface (Bois de Vincennes), 72h after Run #3. Do NOT increase distance beyond 3.5 km — consolidate before progressing. HR cap 145 bpm. Walk breaks if HR exceeds cap. Cancel if any post-Run #3 pain (Achilles, patellar, tibia, plantar fascia) lasted >24h.
recommendations.measurable: Run #4 completed at 3.5 km or less, avg HR <145 bpm, no post-run pain >24h

recommendations.text: Execute both weekend cycling sessions (Sat 60 min Z2 + Sun 50 min Z1-Z2) to arrest the declining chronic load trend. Chronic load dropped from 22.3 to 21.9 as April gravel sessions exit the 28-day window. These sessions provide essential aerobic volume.
recommendations.measurable: Both Saturday and Sunday cycling sessions completed with combined load >= 28

recommendations.text: Increase daily protein intake toward 150g target. Current 7d avg is 126g (16% below target). Distribute 35-40g per meal across 4 meals. Protein supports tendon remodeling during running comeback and preserves muscle mass during caloric deficit.
recommendations.measurable: 3+ days this week with protein intake >= 140g

markers_to_watch.threshold: Any localized pain (Achilles, patellar, plantar, tibia) lasting >24h after Run #3 or Run #4 triggers skip of next run
markers_to_watch.reason: Run #3 exceeded protocol max distance by 41% (3.53 km vs 2.5 km). Tissue tolerance is the critical variable at 104 kg.

markers_to_watch.threshold: Target stabilization >= 21 over next 7 days, then gradual increase toward 25
markers_to_watch.reason: Chronic load declining as April gravel sessions exit 28d window. Weekend cycling volume essential to arrest decline.

markers_to_watch.threshold: Alert if RHR rises >54 bpm for 3+ consecutive days
markers_to_watch.reason: RHR at 49.6 (stable). Monitor for overload signals with increasing running volume.
